provenance: SYNTHETIC — authored for the eval harness; not real people or real résumés.

profiles.name: Jordan Avery
profiles.headline: Backend software engineer, 6 years, Python/Go, distributed systems
profiles.base_resume:
Jordan Avery
Backend Software Engineer

Summary
Backend engineer with 6 years building high-throughput services in Python and Go. Owns reliability, latency, and cost of payment and search infrastructure.

Experience
Senior Backend Engineer, Northwind Payments (2021-present)
- Rebuilt the settlement pipeline in Go, cutting end-of-day reconciliation from 40 minutes to 6 minutes.
- Reduced p99 checkout latency 38% by adding a Redis read-through cache and connection pooling.
- Led migration of 22 services from a monolith to Kubernetes with zero customer-facing downtime.
- On-call rotation owner; drove incident MTTR down from 55 to 18 minutes with better runbooks.

Backend Engineer, Cedar Analytics (2018-2021)
- Built an event-ingestion service in Python (FastAPI) handling 12k events/second.
- Designed the PostgreSQL sharding scheme that supported 4x data growth.
- Wrote the CI pipeline (GitHub Actions) that cut deploy time from 30 to 8 minutes.

Education
B.S. Computer Science, State University (2018)

Skills
Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes, Docker, gRPC, FastAPI, AWS, distributed systems, observability, CI/CD

attributes.name: specialty
attributes.value: distributed systems, payments and search infrastructure

attributes.name: notable_result
attributes.value: cut p99 checkout latency 38% with a Redis read-through cache

attributes.name: notable_result_2
attributes.value: migrated 22 services to Kubernetes with zero downtime

voice: I like owning a problem end to end and measuring the result.
I keep things direct and concrete; I would rather show a number than a buzzword.
I care about reliability and the on-call experience of the whole team.

profiles.name: Priya Raman
profiles.headline: Data analyst, 4 years, SQL/Python, product & growth analytics
profiles.base_resume:
Priya Raman
Data Analyst

Summary
Data analyst with 4 years turning product and marketing data into decisions. Fluent in SQL, Python (pandas), and dashboarding.

Experience
Data Analyst, Brightleaf Commerce (2022-present)
- Built the self-serve funnel dashboard in Looker used daily by 40 people across product and growth.
- Ran the A/B test that raised checkout conversion 11% by simplifying the shipping step.
- Cut the weekly reporting cycle from 2 days to 3 hours by moving hand-built spreadsheets into dbt models.

Junior Data Analyst, Harbor Media (2020-2022)
- Wrote SQL for subscriber-retention analysis feeding the quarterly board deck.
- Automated a churn-flag report in Python that the retention team still uses.

Education
B.A. Economics, City College (2020)

Skills
SQL, Python, pandas, dbt, Looker, Tableau, A/B testing, statistics, data visualization, ETL

attributes.name: notable_result_2
attributes.value: cut weekly reporting cycle from 2 days to 3 hours with dbt

voice: I start from the decision the data needs to support, then work backward.
I keep dashboards simple enough that people actually use them.
I would rather ship a clear answer than a perfect model nobody reads.

profiles.name: Marcus Bell
profiles.headline: Marketing manager, 8 years, B2B SaaS demand generation & content
profiles.base_resume:
Marcus Bell
Marketing Manager

Summary
B2B SaaS marketing manager with 8 years running demand generation, content, and lifecycle programs. Owns pipeline contribution and CAC.

Experience
Marketing Manager, Summit CRM (2019-present)
- Grew marketing-sourced pipeline 62% in two years by rebuilding the webinar and content program.
- Cut cost per marketing-qualified lead 28% by reallocating spend from paid search to lifecycle email.
- Managed a team of 4 and a $1.2M annual budget.

Demand Generation Specialist, Orbit Software (2015-2019)
- Ran paid social and search campaigns that produced 30% of new-trial signups.
- Built the lead-scoring model in HubSpot with the sales team.

Education
B.A. Communications, Lakeside University (2015)

Skills
demand generation, content marketing, marketing automation, HubSpot, Marketo, SEO, paid media, lifecycle email, analytics, team leadership

profiles.name: Elena Torres
profiles.headline: Registered nurse, 7 years, med-surg & ICU, charge nurse experience
profiles.base_resume:
Elena Torres, RN
Registered Nurse

Summary
Registered nurse with 7 years in medical-surgical and intensive-care units, including charge-nurse shifts. BLS and ACLS certified.

Experience
ICU Registered Nurse, Riverside General Hospital (2020-present)
- Manage care for up to 3 critically ill patients per shift, including ventilator and post-op cardiac cases.
- Precept new-graduate nurses; onboarded 9 over three years.
- Serve as charge nurse two shifts a week, coordinating staffing and admissions for a 24-bed unit.

Med-Surg Registered Nurse, Valley Health (2017-2020)
- Cared for 5 to 6 post-surgical patients per shift with a documented 0 medication-error record.
- Helped roll out the barcode medication-administration system to the floor.

Education
B.S. Nursing, State University (2017)

Licensure & Certifications
RN license (active), BLS, ACLS

Skills
critical care, medical-surgical nursing, patient assessment, IV therapy, EHR (Epic), care coordination, preceptorship, charge nurse

attributes.name: leadership
